json_data.title: Introduction to Pragmatics
json_data.reason: This topic directly explores how simple utterances like 'hi' function in context and convey meaning beyond their literal words.

json_data.title: Conversation Analysis
json_data.reason: This graduate-level topic provides a rigorous methodology for studying the detailed structure and social organization of everyday interactions, including how greetings initiate and shape conversations.

json_data.title: Research in Cross-Cultural Communication and Politeness Theory
json_data.reason: This PhD-level topic involves empirical research into the complex and culturally-specific ways greetings and politeness strategies are enacted and interpreted globally.
